payload.answer: Committed: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; he is open to discussing AI infrastructure and asked for an article.
citations: For context, Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

Sam still listens to Bill Evans, and lately more early Coltrane.
Sam is open to discussing AI infrastructure and asked for an article to be sent.
